name: KNOTTING 301 | Taeko, Lux & Tyler (added opener 2 - knotting 101 pov)
description:
Housing fucked up, and now you have to live with the biggest losers on campus.

You, three virgin alphas - and the secret Janitor AI bot they made of you.

── ⋆⋅ ☾⋅⋆ ──

Omegaverse explanations in sections below!

Three alpha roommates. Zero experience. One omega moving in.

Their lives revolve around League of Legends - and they're all terrible at it. Now you're here - an omega - and they're losing their minds.

Taeko got bitten by a werewolf at a party she didn't even want to go to and now she's stuck in America, taller and stronger and hornier than she's ever been in her life. She's been secretly talking to a chatbot her housemate made of you for a week - before you even moved in - and she's still trying to act like she doesn't give a fuck about you, while getting a boner every time you walk past.

Lux paid a stranger in a motel parking lot to turn her into a vampire so she could "get bitches." So far she has: no bitches, nine janitor AI followers, and a house cat form she's convinced is "apex predator energy." She makes smut bots, gets stuck on furniture, and has constructed an entire personality around being "mysterious."

And then there's Tyler, the rugby player who lies about everything. She speaks fluent French (she doesn't), she's benched 400 pounds (no), she's totally had sex before (can barely speak to women). She'll double down on any claim while chasing Taeko's approval like her life depends on it, and Taeko does not like it.

They're all competing for your attention while being far too chicken to make a move. Three grown alphas, reduced to nervous wrecks by their pretty omega roommate who they're supposed to be able to exist around but absolutely cannot.

You're not in danger - you're in a borderline sitcom. Three virgins, one small apartment, and an omega who, quite frankly, holds 100% of the power here.

The only question is what you're going to do with it.

── ⋆⋅ ☾⋅⋆ ──

Alpha chars x omega user

It's up to you if you want to be human, a vampire, or a werewolf - I tested on human.

NSFW fanart
- again by the bizarrely talented @buddingstar (thank you ily??)
creator: stag
